Container.Name: Mousehole
Container.Overview: Mousehole is a background service to update a seedbox IP for MAM and an HTTP server to manage it. Run it on your VPN container's network (set Network Type to your VPN container) so its traffic shares the tunnel. Mousehole stores a MAM session cookie; keep authentication enabled and avoid exposing the WebUI to mixed-trust networks. Docs: https://github.com/t-mart/mousehole/blob/master/README.md Security Guide: https://github.com/t-mart/mousehole/blob/master/docs/security-guide.md
Container.Requires: A running VPN container for Mousehole to route through. Set Network Type to that container after adding.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for accessing the Mousehole web interface. When running on a VPN container's network (Network Type set to your VPN container), this mapping does not apply: publish 5010 on the VPN container instead.

Config.Name: Auth Password
Config.Description: Password for the web UI login page. Set a long, random value. See the Security Guide.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone identifier for displaying localized times, e.g. America/New_York or Europe/London. Default: Etc/UTC.

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Directory to persist the MAM session cookie and application state. Stored in plaintext, so restrict access to it.

Config.Name: Allowed Hosts
Config.Description: Comma-separated Host header values allowed to reach Mousehole. Default: localhost,127.0.0.1,[::1]. Set this to your Unraid IP/hostname when opening the WebUI at http://[IP]:5010. Use * to allow any host. See the Security Guide.

Config.Name: Allowed Origins
Config.Description: Comma-separated origins (scheme+host+port, no path) allowed to make cross-origin requests. Default: same-origin only. Most setups never need this; configure it only for a separate web app calling Mousehole's API. Use * to allow any origin. See the Security Guide.

Config.Name: HTTPS-Only Cookies
Config.Description: Set to true to add the Secure flag to session cookies. Enable only when reaching Mousehole over HTTPS (e.g. behind a reverse proxy); it breaks plain-HTTP logins. Default: false.

Config.Name: API Token
Config.Description: Optional Bearer token for API clients (send Authorization: Bearer <token>). For scripts and tools; independent of the web UI password.

Config.Name: Check Interval (seconds)
Config.Description: Seconds between checks of your public IP. A check only contacts MAM if the IP changed. Default: 300 (5 minutes).

Config.Name: Stale Response (seconds)
Config.Description: Force an update if MAM has not been contacted within this many seconds, catching out-of-band cookie changes. Default: 86400 (1 day).

Config.Name: MAM Request Timeout (seconds)
Config.Description: Seconds to wait for a MAM response before aborting, so Mousehole doesn't hang when the VPN isn't up yet. Default: 10.

Config.Name: Session Duration (seconds)
Config.Description: How long a browser login stays valid before re-authentication is required. Default: 604800 (1 week).

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Log verbosity: error, warn, info, or debug. Default: info.

Config.Name: Insecure: Allow No Auth
Config.Description: Set to true to disable ALL authentication. Only do this on a private, trusted network. Default: false.

Config.Name: User Agent
Config.Description: User agent string for requests to MAM. Defaults to mousehole-by-timtimtim/<version>.
